EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER IN SUPPORT OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND ISSUANCE OF WRIT OF POSSESSION AND JUDGMENT. DECLARATION. NOTICE TO DEFT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YERBA BUENA COMMONS ASSOCIATES INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VARVAROUSIS, JOHN DOES 1-10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 88 PERRY ST. #332 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94107 $3,340.00 RENT, $1,000.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $465.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,805.00, LEASE FORFEITED, IT IS FURTHER AGREED THAT THERE SHALL BE NO FURTHER STAYS IF EXECUTION GRANTED FOR ANY REASON WHATSOVER, PURSUANT TO THE WRITTEN STIPULAITON FOR JUDGMENT ENTERED INTO ON OCTOBER 27, 2009.
